zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stapleton於大約1441年出生在英國諾福爾可英厄姆時，她的父親Miles Stapleton34歲，母親Katharine de la Pole26歲。她於大約1460年與Sir William Calthorpe結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1505年2月18日在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普享年65歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stapleton was born about 1441, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, her father, Miles Stapleton, was 34 and her mother, Katharine de la Pole, was 26. She married Sir William Calthorpe about 1460. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 18 February 1505, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stapleton est née environ 1441, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Miles Stapleton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Katharine de la Pole, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Calthorpe environ 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 18 février 1505, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stapleton um 1441 in Ingham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Miles Stapleton 34 und ihre Mutter Katharine de la Pole 26. Sie hat um 1460 Sir William Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 18. Februar 1505 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stapletonが約1441年にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで生まれた時，父Miles Stapletonは34歳，母Katharine de la Poleは26歳であった。約1460年にSir William Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1505年2月18日にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで65歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stapleton(이)가 대략 1441년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Miles Stapleton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharine de la Pole(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 Sir William Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1505년 2월 18일 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stapleton nasceu aproximadamente 1441, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Miles Stapleton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Katharine de la Pole, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Calthorpe aproximadamente 1460. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 18 de fevereiro de 1505, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stapleton родилась около 1441 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Miles Stapleton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katharine de la Pole, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Calthorpe около 1460 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 18 февраля 1505 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.
